description: Write a Unity SerializedProperty for View property validation or scripted View work. Provide a concrete target with propertyPath plus the JSON value to write.

target.description: Concrete property target. Fields: kind, guid, path, scenePath, objectPath, componentType, componentIndex, propertyPath.

value.description: JSON value to write to the SerializedProperty.

writeMode.description: Optional write mode: commit or preview. Defaults to commit.
